rss.channel:
Duong Vu's Blog $site-url$ Duong Vu's blog about programming, software development, life and more. © $author-meta$, $year-range$
en-us
$site-url$/static/img/me.jpg $site-url$ Duong Vu's Blog
$site-url$ $site-url$ https://validator.w3.org/feed/docs/rss2.html
$for(posts)$
$it.url$ $it.title$ $it.url$ $if(it.description)$ $it.description$ $endif$ $it.date-rfc822$ $author-meta$ Blog
$endfor$
